spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 1 of 1 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Concept page includes a references section with the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/6242687411945472 link and the Document Policy specification.

design_system.rationale: Current page uses shared CSS variables for local styling; no raw hex colours or inline style attributes were found.

summary: DevTools MCP verification refreshed the concept after adding the required ChromeStatus reference link. The live worker probe now uses an absolute same-origin URL for the sync XHR check and reports the actual permissive-or-blocked outcome; the stale raw-hex design-system finding no longer reproduces in the current file.
